About_&_Key_Points:
About
Incorporated in 2008, SBFC Finance Limited is a systemically important, NBFC (NBFC-ND-SI) offering Secured MSME Loans and Loans against Gold
[1]
Key Points
Leading MSME Company
[1]
Among MSME-focused companies, SBFC Finance has one of the highest Assets Under Management (AUM) growth rates in the industry. The company has achieved a CAGR of 33% in AUM from FY18 to Q3FY26, growing from Rs. 778 Crs in 2018 to Rs. 10,478 Crs by December 2025.
